---
title: "Data Visualization Notebook"
format: html
---

<script>
window.location.replace("DataVisualization_Notebook.html");
</script>

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=DataVisualization_Notebook.html">

This page now points directly to the published Week 10 notebook.

If the redirect does not trigger, open the [published notebook](DataVisualization_Notebook.ipynb) or launch it in [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/clementinec/desn2003/blob/main/DataVisualization_Notebook.ipynb).
